productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men White Smoove Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteSoar to the skies and earn those winning points in style with these smooth Smoove adidas shoes. Constructed for ultra-quick performance and enhanced with lightweight comfort, these are poised to let you dominate the field.Product DetailsSynthetic leather upper with overlays in high gloss finish for maximum durabilitySynthetic leather overlay at the collar for enhanced backfoot protection and supportPerforations on the forefoot, side, collar and back heel for ventilationMeshed and plushly padded tongue and collar for absolute breathability and snug comfortBranding on the tongue with a lace-up system for a snug, customised FitMoulded EVA midsole for absolute lightweight comfort and impact protectionPadded insole for in-step comfortDurable non-marking rubber outsole with herring bone pattern for absolute grip and easy movementPivot points on the big toe mound and heel for easy 180 degree rotation of the footArched midfoot with flex grooves for ergonomic comfortMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
